subject: WM-0165 ready for review
body: Closed all WM-0165 changes-requested findings: lossless localized resource presentation with real 1424x861 resident-to-resource mouse evidence and exact quantities; explicit unavailable selection clearing and rapid identity tests; AST default graph plus runtime module/outbound guards; required focused, web-shell 13/13, worker-smoke, typecheck, localization, boundaries, handoff, diff and quality gates pass.
